---
title: "prexorctl backup create"
description: "Trigger the controller to dump Mongo, Redis, and on-disk security/template/module\nstate into a new bundle under the controller-side backup directory"
---

<!-- auto-generated by tools/gen-cli-docs.ts — do not edit by hand. -->

Trigger the controller to dump Mongo, Redis, and on-disk security/template/module
state into a new bundle under the controller-side backup directory.
The CLI does not transport the bundle. Bundles live next to the controller
on disk; copy them off-host (e.g. with restic / rclone) for off-site
retention.

## Usage

```text
prexorctl backup create [flags]
```

## Flags

```text
-h, --help   help for create
```

## Global flags

```text
--ascii               Use ASCII glyphs only (no unicode box drawing, sparklines, etc.)
        --context string      Override active context for this invocation
    -c, --controller string   Override controller URL
    -j, --json                Output in JSON format
        --no-color            Disable colored output
    -t, --token string        Override auth token
    -v, --verbose             Show HTTP request/response details
```
